Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David C. Voss, Jr., esq. (310-306-0515) of Voss, Silverman & Braybrooke LLP for Plaintiff.
Tara M. Steeley, esq. (415-554-4655) Deputy City Attorney of City and County of San Francisco for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SAN FRANCISCO AIRPORT COMMISSION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

The matter is deemed taken under submission as of May 3, 2019 as the Court will allow Plaintiff to submit supplemental brief by April 19, 2019, and defendant's response to supplemental brief by May 3, 2019 (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
